creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Glen Barber wrote:
 > I want to make sure this is not going to copy the current
 > lang/open-cobol to lang/open-cobol-devel.  The patch I have submitted
 > is for the 1.1 branch (which is in development).  The 1.0 branch
 > is/was not affected, and is still obtainable.
 >

Its going to duplicate the PORTS infrastructure like the Makefile and 
pkg-plist in order to keep CVS history.

Your patch will be applied over top of that then commit
ted, leaving the original untouched.


--
